name: Tormenta Negra
title: Tormenta Negra Rum Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Tormenta Negra | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A dark, spicy rum and ginger beer cocktail finished with lime, bitters, and an orange wheel.
marketing_description: Spanish for “Black Storm,” this is a twist on the classic rum and ginger beer cocktail with a more intense BACARDÍ Carta Negra profile.

steps: Fill a highball glass with cubed ice, and squeeze in the lime wedges.
Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum and ginger beer.
Add the bitters and stir gently before serving.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Tormenta Negra 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum 3 lime wedges 3 dash Angostura® bitters 100 ml ginger beer orange wheel as garnish Step 1 Fill a highball glass with cubed ice, and squeeze in the lime wedges. Step 2 Pour in the BACARDÍ Carta Negra Rum and ginger beer. Step 3 Add the bitters and stir gently before serving. Step 4 Garnish with an orange wheel.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Tormenta Negra Rum Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
